seoTitle: How to Switch From TurboTax Live to Regular TurboTax
metaDescription: Thinking about dropping the live-assist tier? See how to switch from TurboTax Live to Regular TurboTax and what changes when you do.
intro: Not everyone needs live expert assistance to file their taxes, and switching from TurboTax Live to Regular TurboTax can save money while giving you more hands-on control. This guide walks through the transition, the differences between the two versions, and what to expect once you make the switch.

steps.heading: Understand the difference between TurboTax Live and Regular
steps.body: TurboTax Live includes access to live experts, while Regular TurboTax is a self-guided experience, so it's worth knowing what you're giving up or gaining.

steps.heading: Follow the steps to switch versions
steps.body: Work through the straightforward process for moving your return from TurboTax Live over to Regular TurboTax.

steps.heading: Weigh the cost savings and control trade-offs
steps.body: Switching to Regular TurboTax can mean cost savings and more direct control over your tax data compared to the Live version.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot common issues during the switch
steps.body: Be ready for a few common hiccups that can come up during the transition, and know how to work through them.

steps.heading: Decide which version fits your filing style
steps.body: Consider whether you prefer hands-on management or value having live assistance, and choose the version that matches how you like to file.

faq.question: Why would I switch from TurboTax Live to Regular TurboTax?
faq.answer: Switching can offer cost savings and more direct control over your tax data if you don't need live expert assistance.

faq.question: Is switching between TurboTax versions difficult?
faq.answer: The video presents it as a straightforward process, though it does cover troubleshooting for common issues that can arise during the transition.

faq.question: Will I lose my entered tax information when I switch?
faq.answer: The tutorial focuses on making the transition smooth, walking through the steps needed so your filing experience stays consistent.

faq.question: Who benefits most from switching to Regular TurboTax?
faq.answer: Both beginners filing their first return and professionals managing multiple clients may benefit, depending on whether they need live guidance or prefer a self-directed approach.
